titleStmt.title: SII 38.407: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 407. (A.R. No. 407 of 1912.) MARUDĀḌU, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south base, central shrine, Purandarēśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler, tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara. It records that the members of the ūr, Taṉkāḷi Pugaḻi, Dēvandai Sēndaṉ Saduran, Vaḍukantai Vaiyiri Tāṅgi and Vaṇṇakkaṉ Sāttaṉ udaimaṉ gifted ninety sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god of the temple for the merit of Veḷḷāḷaṉ Puttēri Kuṭṭattāḻi alias Kalivēlippēraiyaṉ of Marudāḍu alias Vikramaśōḻanallūr in Marudāḍu-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟakkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam.

It is further stated that the ūrār sold land to Uḻundaiy-uḍaiyāṉ Aiyyāṟaṉ Bhaṭṭālagaṉ, an agent of the army official, (daṇḍanāyakan) Madhurāntakamārāyaṉ of Marudāḍu alias Vikramaśōḻanallūr, for digging a tank for quenching the thirst (śrīmadāham nīṅga) of the above individual Kalivēlippēraiyyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyap pāvaiyuñ cirttaṉic celviyum taṉperunteviyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutiya lūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭar vaṉavelippaThis portion is found missing.ṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷicūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākaiyu naṇṇaṟakarumuraṉ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattarayar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum munnavar pakkaṟ ṟennavar vaitta cun=tara muṭiyum Intiranāramun teṇṭiraiīḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatum
Eṟipaṭai keraḷaṉ muṟaimayiṟ cūṭuṅkula taṉamākiya palarpukaḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatir velait tolpaḻantiyum ceruviṟciṉavil IrupaThis portion is found missing.ttoru kālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñcāntiman tivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ tirutakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiya Iraṭṭapāṭieḻaraiilakkamum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavillai matura maṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷaiynāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñciṉa virara pañcapaḷḷiyum pācuṭai paḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti ĀThis portion is found missing.tinakaravaiyiṟcantiraṉ ṟol kulattintirataṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟai kulataṉa kuvaiyuñ ceṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar cera nalkkocalai nāṭun taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colaittaṇṭa puttiyum Ira
ṇacūraṉai muraṇurattākkit tikkaṇakirttittakkaṇalāṭamum(ṅ) kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻintoṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭu kaḻaṟcaṅkai Oṭṭa mahipālaṉai veñcama viḷākatta]This portion is found missing.ñcu vittaruḷi OṉṭiṟalikaḷaiyumRead oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyumpeṇṭirpaṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum verimalart tiṟtta teṟipuṉaṟkaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭalnaṭuvuṭ palakalañcelutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅka panmaṉākiya kiṭārattaracaṉai vākaiyamporu kaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭum kappaṭavitturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetippi
ṟakkamum Ārttavankarikaip porttoḻil vācalil viccātirat toraṇamum moytt[oḻil puṉamaṇipputavamum kanamaṇikkatavamum niṟai śrīvijayamum tuṟainir]This portion is found missing.ppaṉṉaiyum vaṉamalaiyureyir teṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiliṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai yilaṅkācokamum koppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamuṅ kāvalam puricai mevilipaṅkamum miḷaippantūṟuṭaivaḷaippantūṟuṅ kalait takkor pukaḻtalaittakkolamum titamarvalviṉai mātaramaliṅkamuṅ kalāmutirkkaṭun=tiṟal I
lāmuritecamun teṉakkalarpoḻil māṉakkavāramun toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumurak kaṭāramum māpporu taṇ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu marutāṭṭunāṭṭu marutāṭāṉa vikkiramacoḻanallūr veḷḷāḷaṉ putteri kuṭṭat tāḻiyāṉa kalivelip peraiyaṉukku Ivvūr peruntirukkoyiluṭaiya mahādevarkku śan=tirā(ā)tittavalam vaitta tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku vaitta Āṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭu
toṇṇūṟum cāvāmuvāpperāṭu toṇṇūṟum kaiykkoṇṭu muṭṭāmai viḷakku Erippi �ka taṉkāḷi pukaḻiyum tevantai centaṉ caturanum vaṭukantai vayiri tāṅkiyum vaṇṇakkaṉ cāttaṉ Utaimaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrom meṟpaṭi yāṇṭu 2 10 meṟpaṭi marutāṭāṉavikkiramacoḻanallūrt taṇṭanāyakaṉ maturāntaka mārāyaṉ kannmi Uḻantaiyuṭaiyāṉ Aiyāṟaṉ paṭṭālakaṉeṉ Ivvūr ve
ḷḷāḷaṉ putterikuṭṭattāḻiyāṉa kalivelipperaiyaṉukku śrīmatāham niṅka Eri kalla vi m Aṉṟilerik karaikku vaṭakku Atiyaṉūrkku pom vaḻikku kiḻakku tirunanticuvaramuṭaiyār Āvikku terkkum Āka Iṉṉār per Ellaiyuḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi viṟṟukkuṭuttittukku Ippaṭi Aṟivom Ivvū(ra)rom .
Digital edition of SII 38.407 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
